# Snowflake Connection Error Fixtures
# Generic connection failures (not network policy)

## Pattern 1: Generic 08001
08001: Unable to connect to Snowflake. Connection could not be established. Check network connectivity.

## Pattern 2: Connection failed
OperationalError: Connection failed: unable to establish connection to <account>.snowflakecomputing.com

## Pattern 3: Cannot connect
snowflake.connector.errors.DatabaseError: Cannot connect to Snowflake server. Verify account name and region.

## Pattern 4: Connection reset
Connection reset by peer during query execution. The connection was interrupted unexpectedly.

## Pattern 5: Transient connectivity
Temporarily unavailable: Connection to Snowflake service is experiencing transient issues. Retry the operation.
